articles.title: Neemias Queta played one of his best games as Celtics pull away late vs. 76ers: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
Queta had one of the best games of his life, while Jaylen Brown put up LeBron James numbers.

The post Neemias Queta played one of his best games as Celtics pull away late vs. 76ers: 7 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Neemias Queta excelled with a standout performance against the 76ers on March 2.
Jaylen Brown scored impressively, matching LeBron James' performance in the game.
Celtics' late-game success boosts their playoff positioning, benefiting Boston fans.
